name: Countdown
goal: Count down to a target ISO timestamp and fire a ce-countdown-end event when reached.
description: Live countdown timer. Renders the remaining time as colon-separated segments (days, hours, minutes, seconds) sized to format: 'dhms' auto-trims a leading 0-day, 'hms' rolls days into hours, 'ms' rolls hours into minutes, and 's' renders a pure seconds count. Optional inline labels under each segment for marketing-style countdowns. Fires ce-countdown-end exactly once when the remaining time hits zero and stops its internal timer.

props.name: target
props.description: ISO 8601 instant to count down to.

props.name: format
props.description: Segment composition. dhms drops leading 0-day; hms folds days into hours; ms folds hours into minutes; s renders pure seconds.

props.name: labels
props.description: Show small d/h/m/s labels under each segment.

events.name: ce-countdown-end
events.description: Fires exactly once when the remaining time reaches zero.

sideEffects.description: Schedules a setInterval at tickMs to refresh the remaining time.
sideEffects.reason: Live updates require a periodic re-render until the target instant.

nondeterministicReason: timer side effect prevents byte-identical innerHTML across runs
